scripts.dev: npm run stop; (cd server && npx tsx src/agent-runtime.ts) & sleep 1 && (cd server && npx tsx watch src/index.ts) & (cd dashboard && pnpm dev) & wait
scripts.build: cd server && pnpm build && cd ../dashboard && pnpm build
scripts.typecheck: cd server && npx tsc --noEmit && cd ../dashboard && npx tsc --noEmit
